assertions_verified.evidence: mountInGameView renders the handful with per-scenario action buttons, 1-5 confidence buttons, and an optional 280-char note. Submit calls submitHandful via state.js.
After submit, computePhase returns waitingForOpponent=true and renderWaiting() is shown; no reveal or opponent data is rendered.
Once both have submitted, renderReveal renders per-scenario: both players' action, confidence, note (or omitted), plus gto_action and gto_explanation.
mountWrapUpView renders three sections: per-player accuracy (wrap-accuracy), inter-player agreement (wrap-agreement), ranked disagreements (wrap-disagreements).

state.js readGame() applies redactGameForViewer which masks opponent submissions for any round where the viewer has not yet submitted. Firestore Security Rules separately deny direct opponent-data reads. computePhase respects the redaction and renderReveal only runs when both submissions are present.
submit handler validates that every scenario has action and confidence selected; rejects with inline error otherwise.
stats.rankedDisagreements sorts by joint_confidence_min desc (then by joint_confidence_sum, then scenario_id). A (5,5) disagreement (min=5) precedes a (5,2) disagreement (min=2).
